cases.title: Participant event listing query returns events in RegistrationOpen state
preconditions: Seeded events in mixed states: at least one RegistrationOpen, one Published (not yet open), one Draft, one RegistrationClosed
Authenticated Participant actor context
Fixed clock within registration window for RegistrationOpen fixture
PostgreSQL test database per integration test setup
steps: Invoke eventService.listEvents(participantContext, { page: 1, pageSize: 12 }) within a real DB transaction
Inspect returned items and their state fields against persisted event rows
cases.expected: Paginated result includes RegistrationOpen events visible to Participant per permission matrix View open events; role-filtered listing excludes Draft and other non-discoverable states; each item exposes eventId, name, state RegistrationOpen, startAt, and location per API list contract

cases.title: GET /events returns paginated RegistrationOpen events for authenticated participant
preconditions: At least one event published and registration opened (state RegistrationOpen)
Participant JWT from signup or login
Additional non-open events seeded for contrast
steps: Verify response envelope and first matching RegistrationOpen item
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope (items, page, pageSize, total, totalPages); items include RegistrationOpen event(s) with eventId, name, state RegistrationOpen, startAt, location; satisfies FR-05 participant can view events currently open for registration and GET /events default pageSize 12 with sort startAt:asc

cases.title: GET /events/{eventId} returns detail for RegistrationOpen event visible to participant
preconditions: Event in RegistrationOpen state with complete basic metadata and valid ruleConfig registration window
Fixed clock strictly between registrationOpenAt and registrationCloseAt
Participant JWT
steps: Inspect state, registration window fields, and action-relevant metadata in response
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with event detail showing state RegistrationOpen, registration window timestamps, and fields needed for participant to review before registering; event is within configured registration window per BR-02 and state machine guard openRegistrationWindow

cases.title: GET /events?state=RegistrationOpen filters to open-for-registration catalog
preconditions: Seeded RegistrationOpen and RegistrationClosed events discoverable to participants
Participant JWT
cases.expected: RegistrationOpen filter returns only events with state RegistrationOpen; RegistrationClosed filter excludes currently open-for-registration events; optional state filter on GET /events works per API design paginated list endpoints table

cases.title: Participant event discovery page displays RegistrationOpen events with availability context
preconditions: Web app running with at least one RegistrationOpen seeded event
Participant authenticated via /login or /signup redirect to event discovery
Event has name, start time, location, and optional cover image
steps: Navigate to participant event discovery list
Open event detail from the card
cases.expected: Discovery card grid shows RegistrationOpen event with name, timing, location, cover or fallback illustration, and registration-open status indicator; detail page displays event information, windows, and status-dependent CTA per page list and Flow A step 1–2 (user opens discovery and selects event)

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle prerequisite: only RegistrationOpen events appear after publish and open-registration
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT
Draft event with complete metadata and valid registration window (FR-03)
Participant JWT for listing
steps: GET /api/v1/events as participant before organizer publish — note absence of draft event
cases.expected: Draft event never visible to participant; after publish + open-registration the event appears in participant listing with state RegistrationOpen; aligns with state machine Published → RegistrationOpen via openRegistrationWindow and Flow A draft → publish → open registration

cases.title: Participant searches discovery list for RegistrationOpen event by name
preconditions: RegistrationOpen event named uniquely (e.g. Campus Workshop Alpha)
Additional RegistrationOpen events seeded
Participant JWT
cases.expected: HTTP 200; items include the matching RegistrationOpen event; search q parameter filters discoverable open events without returning unrelated states; supports participant browse list with search per page list and FR-28 discovery behavior

cases.title: Draft and Published-not-open events excluded from participant open-events discovery
preconditions: Draft event and Published event (registration not yet opened) owned by organizer
RegistrationOpen event seeded for positive control
Participant JWT
steps: Assert presence of RegistrationOpen control and absence of Draft/Published-only fixtures
cases.expected: Participant listing is role-filtered: Draft and Published (pre-open) events are not returned; only discoverable states including RegistrationOpen appear; satisfies GET /events role-filtered event states and permission matrix View open events scoped to participant-visible catalog

cases.title: RegistrationClosed event not presented as open for registration
preconditions: Event transitioned to RegistrationClosed after registration window ended or manual close
Participant JWT
Separate RegistrationOpen control event exists
cases.expected: RegistrationClosed event absent from RegistrationOpen-filtered list; detail for closed event (if reachable) shows state RegistrationClosed and no register-now affordance; participant cannot view event as currently open for registration per BR-02 window and event lifecycle RegistrationOpen → RegistrationClosed

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET /events returns 401
preconditions: API running
No Authorization header on request
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 401 with typed error envelope; unauthenticated access to protected list and detail endpoints rejected per AC-15 and API principle auth required for non-public endpoints

cases.title: Participant cannot view Draft event detail by direct eventId
preconditions: Draft event exists with known eventId
Participant JWT
cases.expected: HTTP 404 or 403 — Draft event not exposed to Participant scope; original Draft state unchanged; role-filtered access prevents viewing unpublished configuration per permission matrix Create/edit event draft denied to Participant

cases.title: Invalid pagination parameters on GET /events return 400 INVALID_PAGINATION
preconditions: Participant JWT
RegistrationOpen events seeded
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 400 with error code INVALID_PAGINATION; no partial event data returned; pagination contract enforces page ≥ 1 and pageSize max 100

cases.title: Cancelled event no longer discoverable as open for registration
preconditions: Event was RegistrationOpen then cancelled via POST /events/{eventId}/cancel by OrganizerAdmin
Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{cancelledEventId} with Participant token if detail still allowed
cases.expected: Cancelled event absent from RegistrationOpen-filtered discovery list; state Cancelled per state machine RegistrationOpen → Cancelled; participant cannot treat cancelled event as open for registration

cases.title: Events list returns single paginated page envelope not full catalog
preconditions: More than 12 RegistrationOpen events seeded (exceeds default pageSize)
Participant JWT
steps: Count items in response and compare to total field
cases.expected: Response contains at most 12 items while total reflects full matching row count; client receives one page at a time per NFR-05 and AC-14 (no unbounded full-catalog payload in a single call); page and totalPages metadata present

cases.title: Paginated events list beyond last page returns empty items with valid metadata
preconditions: Known count of RegistrationOpen events (e.g. 5 total)
Participant actor context
PostgreSQL test database
steps: Request page 1 with pageSize 12 and record totalPages
Request page equal to totalPages + 1 with same pageSize
cases.expected: Page beyond totalPages returns items: [] with valid page, pageSize, total, and totalPages unchanged; satisfies AC-13 paginated list boundary behavior for participant event discovery

cases.title: Large RegistrationOpen catalog list query returns one page within acceptable response time
preconditions: Seeded RegistrationOpen events exceeding 500 rows
Participant actor context
PostgreSQL test database per integration test setup
steps: Invoke paginated GET /events equivalent query for page 1 pageSize 12
Measure end-to-end query latency for single page fetch
cases.expected: Single page returned with correct total count; response time within acceptable threshold for paginated list when total exceeds 500 rows per NFR-16; query uses events.start_at index for default sort

cases.title: Participant-visible event state filter includes RegistrationOpen only among pre-registration discoverable states
preconditions: Pure participant event visibility or list-filter function
Input event states: Draft, Published, RegistrationOpen, RegistrationClosed, Cancelled
steps: Apply participantDiscoveryFilter or equivalent to each state
Verify RegistrationOpen passes and Draft fails
cases.expected: Filter logic marks RegistrationOpen as visible for participant discovery; Draft excluded; aligns with role-filtered GET /events and FR-05 scope of viewing events currently open for registration

cases.title: Testing plan §3 Events list page 2 — participant views second page of RegistrationOpen events
preconditions: At least 13 RegistrationOpen events seeded (exceeds default pageSize of 12)
Authenticated Participant JWT
Events seeded with distinct startAt values for sort verification
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12&sort=startAt:asc and record total and totalPages
Compare page-2 items to expected second slice ordered by startAt ascending
cases.expected: Page-2 response has page=2, pageSize=12, total matching page-1 total, totalPages=ceil(total/12), items are the correct contiguous slice of RegistrationOpen events per testing plan §3 Events list page 2 scenario and AC-13
